subject: Add DCAE cleanup job, update CBS version
commit_message:
Add DCAE cleanup job, update CBS version

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1729
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1317
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflucas@research.att.com>
Change-Id: I642dfdbeb87fcfebda6c95ffe5e57f942d48a62b

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 1:

TEST RESULTS FOR OOM/DCAE (staging branch)
2019-08-22
Partial deployment of ONAP (aaf, cassandra, consul, dcaegen2, dmaap, log, msb, policy, robot, sdc)

NOTE: The DCAE service change handler does not get past the init stage due to
problems with SDC (cassandra and be configuration jobs failing).  The SDC failure
may be related to https://jira.onap.org/browse/OOM-2057.
The DCAE healthcheck fails because the service change handler
does not start.  All other DCAE components are successfully deployed.

Robot healthcheck result
========================
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Basic DCAE Health Check                                               | FAIL |
500 != 200
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
